name: 〔 𓊔 Two time ⚡︎ 〕
description:
ALL MY BOTS ARE TAGGED WITH DEAD DOVE! PLEASE BE MINDFUL THAT IT IS JUST INCASE SOMETHING GOES WRONG!

i wonder who asked for this guys 😭😭😭, it totally wasn’t the same person who asked for the past two and the elliot bot... trust... established relationship by the way (any rel u want)

Anyways like always if the bot speaks for you , just edit the part out , i don't control what the bot says or does

Don't like it ? , don't chat with it , it's simple really , there's no need to harrass creators about something YOU don't like

IF you leave a review , whenever its a death threat , dead on insult , or a blank bad review (BC I SEE YOU , you aren't slick) YOUR REVIEW WILL BE DELETED

IF THE BOT confuses you for another gender , it is also an issue THAT I CANNOT FIX , the website and llm makes it so that if the bot is male then it makes the user female , which i get it annoying as hell , but it is not my fault!

if this happens , please just change the pronouns , and it should follow your directive!

YOU HAVE BEEN WARNED
